oneOf.description: AWS ALB route options for EKS.

ipAddressType.description: Optional ALB IP address type, such as `dualstack`.

staticAddressName.description: Optional static address name for the Gateway frontend.

albName.description: Optional ALB name when using BYO Application Gateway resources.

description: Provider-specific route options required by supported managed profiles.
